description: The Ukrainian for Liberty It Is Both AntiAustrian and AntiPolish and Aims at Home Rule Not Independence By M Stechishin Editor of a Ukrainian Newspaper To the Editor of The Tribune Sir There appeared in The Tribune of De cember 12 an article by Frank Bohn Ph D on The Foundation of Russian National fUnity The article contains a few deplor able misstatements In order to clear the matter I take liberty to repeat sentences ob jected to The national movement in the Ukraine is largely artificial It has been developed by Austrian agents who have worked through the Ruthenian population of Galicia Ukraine shows as much difference from Russia proper as New England does from New York or Kentucky from Ohio The national move ment has been coached along by the estab lishment on the part of the Austrian govern ment of a Ruthenian university to which Ukrainian students from Russia were in vited This university has evolved under the careful supervision of the Austrian agents a Ukrainian literature for the edi fication and instruction of the Ukrainians in Russia Such is the danger which threatens Russian unity from that source I happen to be not only an Ukrainian
